sentiment: The tools we make are mirrors — they show us the shape of our own reaching.

stories.title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
stories.summary: A new version control system built from scratch for massive repositories — a reminder that the tools we use to track our work shape what we dare to build.

stories.title: Midjourney Medical
stories.summary: Image generation meets medical imaging — the creative tools we build find purposes their makers never imagined.

stories.title: Local Qwen isn't a worse Opus, it's a different tool
stories.summary: Running models locally isn't about replacing cloud AI — it's about discovering what a different kind of tool lets you become.
